Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-19 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
Today's data shows TNGX at the top of the momentum ranking with a perfect composite score of 98.1, driven by exceptional 1-year returns of 966.67% and consistent ratio progression across all timeframes (all 5 ratio passes). The stock maintains clean momentum signals with normal volatility and passes all four SMA gates, indicating it trades well above its major moving averages. TYRA ranks second with strong 6-month and 1-year returns (211.85% and 248.25%) and also clears all SMA thresholds, though its negative 1-day return (-0.42%) created a problematic ratio that prevented a perfect ratio score. Both leaders significantly outperform SPY and QQQ across the measured periods, with TNGX showing particularly extreme outperformance of 949.51% versus SPY over 1 year. The data reflects a market environment where select high-momentum names are generating outsized returns well beyond broad indices, though TNGX's 966% annual return represents an extreme outlier that warrants scrutiny for sustainability.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.

Click column headers to sort  |  Score = percentile composite: returns + ratio passes + bad-SPY resilience  |  SMA ✓ = price above all SMAs (30/50/100/200)  |  Ratio = short-term momentum consistency (out of 5 tests)  |  M = momentum signal (sortable) —  ● clean  ● stalling  ● overextended  |  V = volume confirmation (sortable) —  ● confirmed  ● normal  ○ thin  |  PB = entry timing: down day on strong stock (sortable by 1d return) —  ● buy today  ○ none  |  OL = theme overlap vs owned tickers —  ● overlap  ○ clear
